description: Populate the base configuration graph from Central APIs (sites, collections, groups, devices, config profiles). Without filters refreshes everything; pass --site-id or --device-group-id to refresh a single scope cheaply.

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: Only refresh the given site and the devices contained in it.

parameters.name: device-group-id
parameters.description: Only refresh devices whose deviceGroupId equals this value.
